title: potentilla litoralis var. ovium
intro: Potentilla litoralis var. ovium, also known as the Beach Cinquefoil or Sea Cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Potentilla litoralis var. ovium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
